item.title: Fuck that wannabe-yank apartheid nepobaby
item.description: Gotta hand it to him tho, he's bringing Danes and Swedes together, something only massive amounts of alcohol usually do. Edit: Danish dockworkers and truckers have entered into a sympathy strike from the 20th of December, joined by their fellow union workers in Norway and Finland. This means no Teslas will be entering Sweden from the rest of Scandinavia.
item.dc:creator: pip1

What are dragons but a representation of greed and wrath
r o u n d
yeah that happened
Harry Potter versus Percy Jackson let's gooooooo.
Yes, Hannah Montana Linux is a thing.
When a power structure relies on traditional gender roles the people who do not fit in are a threat.
If only I could wake up with such enthusiasm for the day.
creechur
ITS NOT SAFE
THEY WALCC

item.description:
A hell of a line indeed. *fans self*
Did I upload this dump from a delayed yet moving train with borked wifi via my phone? Yes I did. Was that a good idea that didn't take any time or data at all? No it wasn't. The things we do for memes....

item.title: Found this little girl at the end of October. Look at her now after 2 months of life in a warm home surrounded by care and love
item.description:
28.10.2023 (1 day at home) When I found her, her eyes were completely full of pus and as it turned out the left one was gone.. the infection had completely "eaten" it before I found her... also she was so skinny
She was so hard to catch.. She hissed and scratched a lot out of fear at first, but it only took me 2 days to melt her heart and make her purring! It was such an incredible feeling when she purred for the first time
29.11.2023 (2 days at home)
31.10.2023 (4 days at home)
31.10.2023 First bath
01.11.2023 (5 days at home)
01.11.2023 (5 days at home)
05.11.2023 (9 days at home)
14.11.2023 (2,5 weeks at home) What a lady!
19.11.2023 (3 weeks at home) Now she’s healthy and super active baby!
27.11.2023 (a month at home) her left eye doesn’t bother her. The vet said that there is no need to worry, there is no inflammation and no manipulation of her eyes is required at the moment
03.12.2023 (a month at home) The thought that she could have been left on the street without help and died without timely treatment often made me cry the first weeks I took her in. I’m so happy that she’s safe now. All the time and all the money spent was absolutely worth it!
09.12.2023 A little yoga is never too much
12.12.2023 (1.5 month at home)
16.12.2023 (1.5 month at home) She befriended my older cat. His life is much more active now
04.12.2023 He wasn't ready for it :)
17.12.2023 (1,5 month at home)
17.12.2023 (1,5 month at home) As you've noticed, she really likes this cot :)
21.12.2023 I'm happy that this cute pirate is now mine. My Mushka ❤️ Thank you for reading & watching ❤️
item.dc:creator: beadedbonsaitree

item.title: You can have both of these thoughts
item.description: Hating all of a people for what some of them have done is evil too. Yes, I see you False Equivalency knights running this way - just because you find other evil in the recent vicinity does not excuse new evil. Most viral edit: Do something nice for someone today just because you can.

item.title: Can't make it as a doctor? Go work for an insurance company and deny care for no reason
item.description:
The full article, along with more examples and background on how failed doctors can get a role making decisions on medical issues at insurance companies, can be found here: https://www.propublica.org/article/malpractice-settlements-doctors-working-for-insurance-companies
Another doctor they cover who stopped being a surgeon after botching multiple procedures now has a LinkedIn profile that brags about saving insurers money by making it harder for people to get the care their doctors prescribe.
Of course, your insurance company may not even bother to have actual human beings looking over the applications and claims, as they might just be using algorithms to deny them en masse.
https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/how-algorithms-are-being-used-to-deny-health-insurance-claims-in-bulk#transcript The United States needs true Universal Healthcare now.
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer

item.dc:creator: Jellyfishsocks

item.title: “Everyday we stray further from god”- Ash ketchup
item.description:
Going to the local grocery store to get ground beef for taco. What’s that in the corner of my eye I see? Prime rib on sale? I did the only thing any self respecting man would do. Make ?
Cut to 2 inch thick steaks. Salt and pepper generously on all sides. FYI once you cut the 3 bone prime ribs down you get ribeye steaks.
I like to dry salt brine the steak over night. Look at that rib cap.
Sous vide in ziploc bag because wifey said we have no more room for a vacuum sealer or an induction circulator. 4 hours of monitoring the water at 120-130f.
4 hours later. Take steak out and Pat dry and save the juice.
Sear off on high heat. I like a ceramic heavy bottom pan. It’s much easier to clean up and transfer heat good.
Make compound butter( rosemary, thyme, black pepper, garlic and shallots) and blast it with a torch and let rest for 15 mins. Take this time to wash all your dishes and pans.
Cut out the bone save it for stocks. I like to separate the steak by the muscle groups. Each piece will have a different texture.
Personally I like mine rare but you do you.
Cut a pieces of your compound butter and a little flour to make a liaison. Than add the juice from bag to make a sauce.
item.dc:creator: ChefboiRdeez69z

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur

greetings, online friends
cool fanny pack
there weren't any goth girls in my grade sadly
nailed it
ok
better get some more waffles, Dave
the dream
unsettling
sounds about right
what
i absolutely suck at drawing
what the fuck
"Aliens" Ripley
looks like he was 65-66
sounds like a boring costume
mmm hmm
that’s it for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The 374th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays ep 9
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: A Hip Hop/R&B collection for Imgur, from decades of Hits on the Airwaves
item.description:
Public Enemy - Fight the Power
NWA - Straight Outta Compton A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this post: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4uxzW6L0Xw9G6SyOBMHzAw Previous posts: Wayback in 73 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 80 - https://imgur.com/gallery/ZVtxgza Wayback in 83 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 85 - https://imgur.com/gallery/lrddmXp Wayback in 88 - https://imgur.com/gallery/qBqeSu1 Wayback in 93 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 95 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkckKb3 Wayback in 98 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA Wayback in 03 - https://imgur.com/gallery/pyMZXVP
Beastie Boys - Intergalactic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qORYO0atB6g
Wu-Tang Clan - Protect Ya Neck
Missy Elliott (and Ludacris) - Gossip Folks
MC Hammer - U Can't Touch This
SNAP! - The Power
Eminem - Lose Yourself
Jay-Z - 99 Problems
DMX - X Gonna Give it to Ya'
TLC - What About Your Friends
RUN DMC - Mary Mary
Kelis - Milkshake
Coolio (RIP) - Gangster's Paradise
The Sugarhill Gang - Rapper's Delight
Wu-Tang Clan - C.R.E.A.M.
Tupac - Changes Originally recorded in 1992, it was remixed and released posthumously after Shakur's murder in 1996
Missy Elliot - Work It
Beyoncé (and Jay-Z) - Crazy in Love
Snoop Dogg - What's My Name?
Brandy and Monica - The Boy is Mine
DMX - Rudolph the Red Nosed Reindeer
RUN DMC - Christmas in Hollis https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OR07r0ZMFb8
Aaliyah - Are You That Somebody
Ol' Dirty Bastard (of the Wu-Tang Clan) - Shimmy Shimmy Ya
TLC - Waterfalls
Salt-N-Peppa - Whatta Man
Christina Aguilera and Lil Kim - Can't Hold Us Down
NWA - Fuck Tha Police I can't imagine why this particular song never recieved an official music video like the others on the album
Inner Circle - Bad Boys Originally released in 1987 to poor sales and zero airplay. Then it became engrained into pop culture when it was selected as the theme song to the '89 reality series "COPS" (one of the producers was unexpectedly a fan of the group) After this as well as the unexpected success of one of their later songs (Sweat - A La La La La Long), they re-released it in '93 as a single and it became a huge hit on the charts. Especially in Europe.
2Pac - Dear Mama
Jay Z - Hard Knock Life
Outkast - Rosa Parks
Beastie Boys - Sabotage
Tag Team - Whoomp! (There It Is)
Slick Rick - Children's Story
Will Smith - Gettin' Jiggy With It
Anthrax, Public Enemy - Bring Tha Noize
TLC - Creep
Wyclef Jean and Missy Elliott - Party To Damascus
Brandy - I Wanna Be Down
Dr. Dre - Keep Their Heads Ringin'
RUN DMC - Run's House
NWA - Express Yourself
Ashanti - Rock Wit U (Awww Baby)
Ini Kamoze - Here Comes the Hotstepper
RUN DMC - It's Like That
New Edition - Mr. Telephone Man
50 - In Da Club
Outkast - Hey Ya! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PWgvGjAhvIw
Ice Cube - It Was a Good Day
Ice-T - Colors
Snoop Dog and Pharrell - Beautiful
Stetsasonic - Talkin' All That Jazz
Destiny's Child - No, No, No
4 THE CAUSE - Stand By Me
Beyoncé (and Sean Paul) - Baby Boy
Aaliyah - Miss You https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CJ6sHaL79J8
Inner Circle - Sweat (A La La La La Long)
Brandy - Almost Doesn't Count
Fresh Prince and DJ Jazzy Jeff - Nightmare on My Street
The Fat Boys - Are You Ready for FREDDY?!
Ludacris - Stand Up
Beyoncé and Jay-Z - Bonnie and Clyde (featuring the late Lance Reddick)
Shaggy - Boombastic
Usher - My Way
Chaka Demus & Pliers - Twist and Shout (Feat. Jack Radics)
Brandy - Baby
Naughty by Nature - Feel Me Flow
Raphael Saadiq - Ask of You
Bell Biv DeVoe - Poison
Dionne Farris - I Know
New Edition - Cool it Now
Method Man and Mary J. Blige - All I Need
Usher - You Make Me Wanna
Chingy - Right Thurr
Adina Howard - Freak Like Me
DJ Jazzy Jeff and The Fresh Prince - BOOM! Shake the Room!
Salt-N-Pepa - Shake Your Thang
Sean Paul - Like Glue
MoKenStef (feat Grand Puba) - He's Mine
SWV - I'm So Into You
New Edition - Candy Girl
Total [feat. The Notorious B.I.G.] - Can't You See
Monica - Don't Take it Personal (Just One of Dem Days)
Shaggy - Oh Carolina
Jade - Every Day of the Week
Puff Daddy [feat. The Notorious B.I.G. & Busta Rhymes] - Victory
Luniz - I Got 5 on It
Busta Rhymes and Mariah Carey - I Know What You Want
Digital Underground - The Humpty Dance
Mel Brooks - To Be or Not to Be
Snoop Dogg and Anna Kendrick - Winter Wonderland
